item.title: Build Support (System) v1.9.1.34

Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 15:31:37 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Miscellaneous VIs help build applications and packages

Release Notes: [1.9.1]
- fix bug in Write Node to VIPB.vi to release file lock
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: G CLI VI Package Manager Tools v0.2.1.15
item.description:
Product: G CLI VI Package Manager Tools v0.2.1.15
Company: Wiresmith Technology
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 14:37:57 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Contains a series of tools for automating VI package manager from the command line including:

*vipBuild - Build a package from a VIPB file.
* vipcApply - Apply a VIPC file.

This requires VI Package Manager Pro in order to have access to the API.

Release Notes: * VIPBuild now returns path VIP file as 'BUILD_OUTPUT=""'
item.dc:creator: Wiresmith Technology

item.title: G CLI LabVIEW Builder v0.2.0.9
item.description:
Product: G CLI LabVIEW Builder v0.2.0.9
Company: Wiresmith Technology
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 14:37:57 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Provides a G CLI tool to automate build specifications in LabVIEW

Release Notes: * First Release
item.dc:creator: Wiresmith Technology

item.title: JSON-Schema v0.2.0.9
item.description:
Product: JSON-Schema v0.2.0.9
Company: PRIrvin
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 14:37:57 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Library for converting LV objects into JSON Schema

Release Notes: #2 fix Creat JSON Schema (Interactive).vi button logic
#3 fix schema formatting of cluster and nested clusters
#4 fix converting table data to json datatypes (converts to numeric rather than string)
- add tools for building and stripping JSON $Path
- recursively inspect schema to table and vice versa (useful for nested clusters)
item.dc:creator: PRIrvin

item.title: JSON-Schema v0.1.4.8
item.description:
Product: JSON-Schema v0.1.4.8
Company: PRIrvin
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 14:37:57 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Library for converting LV objects into JSON Schema

Release Notes: enable 64 bit labview
item.dc:creator: PRIrvin

item.title: JSON-RPC v1.2.6.15
item.description:
Product: JSON-RPC v1.2.6.15
Company: PRIrvin
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 14:37:57 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Library for encoding and decoding JSON-RPC 2.0 request and response objects

https://www.jsonrpc.org/specification

Release Notes: [1.2.6]
- enable 32/64 bit labview
item.dc:creator: PRIrvin
